title: Dashboard filter for entire dashboard
excerpt:
Hi 
We are using dashboards, and we are missing more advanced filtering options. I know I can filter each widget, but I want to have a filter that filters all widgets together. F.ex. I want to change period to last month…

posts.author: Trond_Kristiansen (Trond Kristiansen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

We are using dashboards, and we are missing more advanced filtering options. I know I can filter each widget, but I want to have a filter that filters all widgets together. F.ex. I want to change period to last month, or this month…etc., for my statistics, without having to filter this in each widget.
Is this possible? @Qassam-monday.com

Trond

posts.author: booey811 (Gabriel Barr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Trond_Kristiansen,

I came across your post while trawling for something else and saw you’d had no reply. In case you’re still trying to work around this, the feature is available!

The attached picture is a screenshot of a sample dashboard.

The section highlighted in blue is the filter and options section for the widget, and the section highlighted in red is the filter section for the entire board.

Filters activated in the red section will be active (and you won’t be able to turn them off) when you view individual widget filters.

I hope this helped

Screenshot 2021-03-17 at 17.30.301235×541 27.8 KB

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
